---
title: "Research & Publications"
---

<style>
#category-pills .category-pill {
  color: #6c757d;
  border: solid 1px #dee2e6;
  border-radius: .25rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: .65em;
  padding-left: .5em;
  padding-right: .5em;
  padding-top: .15em;
  padding-bottom: .15em;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-right: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
}
#category-pills .category-pill.active {
  background-color: var(--bs-primary);
  color: white;
  border-color: var(--bs-primary);
}
</style>
<div class="d-flex flex-wrap mb-4" id="category-pills"></div>

<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default" id="listing-listing">
<div class="list quarto-listing-default" id="publications-list"></div>
<div class="listing-no-matching d-none">No matching items</div>
</div>

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    fetch('www/publications.json')
      .then(response => response.json())
      .then(items => {
        const list = document.getElementById('publications-list');
        const pillsContainer = document.getElementById('category-pills');
        if (list) {
          const allCategories = new Set();
          items.forEach(item => {
            if (item.keywords) item.keywords.forEach(cat => allCategories.add(cat));
          });

          if (pillsContainer) {
            let pillsHtml = `<div class="category-pill active" data-category="all">All</div>`;
            Array.from(allCategories).sort().forEach(cat => {
              pillsHtml += `<div class="category-pill" data-category="${cat}">${cat}</div>`;
            });
            pillsContainer.innerHTML = pillsHtml;

            window.filterPublications = function(category) {
              document.querySelectorAll('#category-pills .category-pill').forEach(pill => {
                if (pill.getAttribute('data-category') === category) {
                  pill.classList.add('active');
                } else {
                  pill.classList.remove('active');
                }
              });

              const listItems = list.querySelectorAll('.quarto-post');
              listItems.forEach(item => {
                if (category === 'all') {
                  item.style.display = '';
                } else {
                  const itemCatsBase64 = item.getAttribute('data-categories');
                  if (itemCatsBase64) {
                    const itemCats = decodeURIComponent(atob(itemCatsBase64)).split(',');
                    item.style.display = itemCats.includes(category) ? '' : 'none';
                  } else {
                    item.style.display = 'none';
                  }
                }
              });
            };

            pillsContainer.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
              if (e.target.classList.contains('category-pill')) {
                window.filterPublications(e.target.getAttribute('data-category'));
              }
            });
          }

          items.forEach((item, index) => {
            const keywords = item.keywords || [];
            const dataCategories = btoa(encodeURIComponent(keywords.join(',')));
            const catsHtml = keywords.map(cat => 
              `<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterPublications('${cat.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">${cat}</div>`
            ).join('\n');

            const url = item.url || '#';
            const target = item.url ? 'target="_blank"' : '';
            const linkStartTitle = item.url ? `<a class="no-external" href="${url}" ${target}>` : `<span class="no-external" style="color: inherit;">`;
            const linkEndTitle = item.url ? `</a>` : `</span>`;
            
            const linkStartMeta = item.url ? `<a class="no-external" href="${url}" ${target}>` : `<div class="no-external">`;
            const linkEndMeta = item.url ? `</a>` : `</div>`;

            const itemHtml = `
<div class="quarto-post image-left" data-index="${index}" data-categories="${dataCategories}">
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
${linkStartTitle}${item.title}${linkEndTitle}
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
${linkStartTitle}${item.journal}${linkEndTitle}
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
${catsHtml}
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
${linkStartMeta}
<div class="listing-date">
${item.date}
</div>
<div class="listing-author">
${item.authors}
</div>
${linkEndMeta}
</div>
</div>`;
            list.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', itemHtml);
          });
        }
      })
      .catch(err => console.error('Error loading publications.json', err));

    const renderers = {
      'list-presentations': (item) => {
        let html = `<a href="${item.url}" target="_blank">${item.title}</a>, a ${item.type} ${item.description}`;
        if (item.event) {
          html += item.event_url ? `, presented at <a href="${item.event_url}" target="_blank">${item.event}</a>` : `, presented at ${item.event}`;
        }
        if (item.context) {
          html += item.context_url ? `, <a href="${item.context_url}" target="_blank">${item.context}</a>` : `, ${item.context}`;
        }
        return html + ` (${item.date})`;
      },
      'list-posters': (item) => `<a href="${item.url}" target="_blank">${item.title}</a>, a ${item.type} ${item.description}, presented at <a href="${item.event_url}" target="_blank">${item.event}</a> (${item.date})`,
      'list-events': (item) => {
        let html = `<a href="${item.url}" target="_blank">${item.title}</a>, ${item.description}`;
        if (item.date) html += ` (${item.date})`;
        if (item.details) html += `<br><blockquote style="margin-top: 0.5rem; color: #666; border-left: 3px solid #ccc; padding-left: 1rem;">${item.details}</blockquote>`;
        return html;
      }
    };

    const dataSources = [
      { id: 'list-presentations', file: 'www/presentations.json' },
      { id: 'list-posters', file: 'www/posters.json' },
      { id: 'list-events', file: 'www/events.json' }
    ];

    dataSources.forEach(source => {
      fetch(source.file)
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(items => {
          const ul = document.getElementById(source.id);
          if (ul) {
            items.forEach(item => {
              const li = document.createElement('li');
              li.innerHTML = renderers[source.id] ? renderers[source.id](item) : '';
              ul.appendChild(li);
            });
          }
        })
        .catch(err => console.error('Error loading ' + source.file, err));
    });
  });
</script>


# Presentations

<ul id="list-presentations"></ul>


# Posters

<ul id="list-posters"></ul>


# Events organization

<ul id="list-events"></ul>
